chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Revision Application No.S-360 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on CMA No.206/2020. 2. For order on CMA No.265/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 12-11-2025. Mr. Hameedullah Dahri advocate for the applicants. = Learned counsel for the applicants does not press this Civil Revision Application on the ground that same has become infructuous; hence instant Civil Revision Application alongwith listed applications are dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE *Saleem*
